title: T-030 — FEFO query API (server function)
prompt:
# T-030 — FEFO query API

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §9.1, §9.2.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`getFefoSuggestions(input)` server function executing the rule (T-014) and returning ranked suggestions. SLO <500ms P95.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/fefo-query.ts`. Inputs per §9.1: product_id, warehouse_id, qty_required, target_qa_status. Pull rule version 'fefo_strategy_v1' from registry; execute SQL §9.2 (LIMIT 20). Apply per-product picking_strategy override (items.picking_strategy) — if 'fifo' route to fifo_strategy_v1.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/fefo-query.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/fefo-query.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a product with three available LPs (different expiries), when getFefoSuggestions runs, then results return top 3 sorted by expiry asc nulls last.
2. Given items.picking_strategy='fifo', when getFefoSuggestions runs, then results sort by created_at asc using fifo_strategy_v1.
3. Given an LP with qa_status='HOLD', when getFefoSuggestions runs with default target, then it is excluded from results.
4. Given executions on a 10k seeded fixture, when measured, then P95 latency < 500ms.

## Test strategy
- RED: fefo-query.test.ts covers FEFO sort, FIFO route, qa-gating, latency.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test fefo-query`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass rule registry (must read fefo_strategy_v1).
- Do not skip qa_status gating.
- Do not return more than 20 rows.

pipeline_inputs.description: FEFO suggestion server function honoring per-product picking_strategy override.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reads rule from registry; routes to FIFO when product configured. Limit 20. SLO <500ms P95.

Given an LP with qa_status='HOLD', when run with defaults, then it is excluded
Given a 10k-row seed, when measured, then P95 latency <500ms
